title: Debug Rendering Performance
description: Identify and fix unnecessary re-renders in React components.
steps: Open React DevTools Profiler, record interaction
Look for components with high render count or long render time
Check: is parent re-rendering unnecessarily? (props unchanged)
Fix: wrap component with React.memo if props are stable
Fix: memoize callbacks with useCallback, values with useMemo
Fix: split large components into smaller ones
Verify: profile again, compare render counts
Check bundle: lazy load heavy components below the fold
